pattern: Customers express frustration due to delays in processing transactions or verifications.
product_or_process_recommendation: Introduce a dedicated real-time tracking feature for transactions and verifications with regular updates to keep customers informed.

pattern: Customers feel inadequately informed about the status of their requests or issues.
product_or_process_recommendation: Implement a proactive communication strategy to notify customers of any issues with their submissions or eligibility before they inquire.

pattern: Agents fail to express sufficient empathy regarding customers' financial losses or urgent needs.
product_or_process_recommendation: Provide empathy training for agents to improve engagement with customers, particularly in scenarios involving financial distress or urgent concerns.
